use_cases: Displaying user or entity information in a dashboard layout with expandable modal details
Presenting key metrics or summaries that users can click to see full details
Creating interactive dashboard interfaces with user avatar representations
ai_summary: A dashboard card component with modal functionality, likely displaying user or entity data with an associated avatar. Built with Radix UI primitives for accessibility. The card serves as a container that reveals modal content on interaction, common in SaaS and analytics dashboards for presenting detailed information on demand.
